pi_items.source: Task description requires navigating the BlenderBIM viewport, selecting a wall, and inspecting its IFC properties.
The task operates on an .ifc model within a BIM environment, inspecting the properties and psets of a wall.
Inspecting BIM/IFC models for property sets such as 'Pset_WallCommon' is a standard workflow for architects and BIM coordinators.
BIM and IFC data formats are foundational tools within the Architecture, Engineering, and Construction (AEC) industry.

privileged_info_summary: The task utilizes a real-world sample IFC model ('AC20-FZK-Haus.ifc' downloaded from ifcwiki.org), which represents the FZK-Haus reference building. The model contains exactly 13 IfcWallStandardCase elements, which are assigned standard IFC properties like Name, GlobalId, and property sets such as 'Pset_WallCommon'.
